targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  observed_at,
  market_id,
  strategy_id,
  profile_id,
  decision_status,
  skip_reason,
  edge,
  limit_price,
  source_ok,
  orderbook_ok,
  risk_ok,
  blocker
FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  skip_reason,
  count() AS count
FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND decision_status NOT IN ('trade', 'trade_small')
GROUP BY skip_reason
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT
  observed_at,
  run_id,
  market_id,
  token_id,
  strategy_id,
  profile_id,
  decision_status,
  skip_reason,
  edge,
  limit_price,
  source_ok,
  orderbook_ok,
  risk_ok,
  blocker
FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 500
